summary: Added one richer deterministic UI fixture for Today Continue: a debug-only seed writes one current-day planned Focus item, Today exposes stable Continue accessibility identifiers, and make ui-smoke now runs both maintained Today XCUITests.
validations_failed: python3 automation/context/build_context.py --slice-id owlory-ui-test-fixture-seeder-batch-2 and python3 automation/supervisor/run_next.py --dry-run initially failed because the new queue slice used invalid status ready; the slice was corrected to queued and both commands passed.

contract_status_changes.before: Owlory had one debug-only fresh-day seed that reset app-local data and let TodayStore create a deterministic dashboard.
contract_status_changes.after: Owlory has a second debug-only seed, --owlory-ui-seed-today-continue-item, that resets app-local data and writes one current-day planned Focus item through the normal Today persistence shape.

contract_status_changes.before: The maintained XCUITest smoke proved only the seeded Today dashboard launch surface.
contract_status_changes.after: The maintained XCUITest smoke also proves that a seeded current Focus item appears in the Today Continue section through stable accessibility identifiers.

contract_status_changes.before: Today Continue rows had visible labels but no stable row identifiers for UI automation.
contract_status_changes.after: Today Continue exposes a stable header identifier and source-derived row identifiers for focused UI assertions.
make ui-smoke runs the maintained OwloryUITests/OwloryUITests class, currently the launch-surface smoke and the seeded Continue smoke.

residual_risks: This remains focused XCUITest smoke coverage, not a broad UI regression suite.
The seeded Continue item is a current Focus item only; it does not prove other Continue sources such as training sessions, Home tasks, protocol runs, or Writing notes.
No repo-managed screenshots were preserved, so screenshot-verified proof is not claimed.
Device and TestFlight behavior remain unverified.
recommended_next_reason: If more UI harness depth is needed, add one more deterministic fixture and one focused assertion, such as a seeded Write note appearing in the Write tab or a seeded Home task appearing in Home, rather than expanding into a broad suite.
